extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Agent Builder tool configuration panel for the ServiceNow tool named "Search Incidents by Incident Number." The form displays the tool name, activity, description, and a required ServiceNow connection field. The shared ServiceNow connection is already selected, and the Primary section below shows an Incident ID input mapping.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows that the required ServiceNow connection has already been selected in the "ServiceNow connection *" field as "Shared ServiceNow Connection."
